itemListElement.reviewBody:
This is the worst school ever I have seen ... My son has spent 9 years in the school and at the time of admission school management will talk very politely with the parents and after the admission if parents have any issue then they will not listen ... And they don't listen to parents openion 😞 and Nanima she is too rude ... Everyday she have problem with every child ... And specially Mrs Rejaa gorge she will not listen anything of parents she will block the parents mobile number 😞And in front  of transport drivers parents can't say anything instead of supporting parents school supports transport driver ...

This is a humble request to all parents to think and take admission

And nanima will never think before insulting .. she insult parents and child both and she insult child in front of whole school  which is very embarassing

Transport driver are like there family members in front of transport drivers school management will not listen anything of parents

itemReviewed.name: St Mathews Academy And Junior College - Salunkhe Vihar Society,Mohammed Wadi

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Worst school ever.. Very arrogant principal..
Don't ever think to get admission in this school..
Third class teaching with useless so called rules..
They are very good in criticising and demotivate your child every time.
Principal will talk very politely while taking admission but once you get admission over here they will show the true Colours..
Few teachers are very good but some selected teachers are literally monsters including principal.
School fees are on lower side but same the culture, studies and environment of school is also on lower side.. but donation is on higher side..

So my humble request to all parents save your child from this ruthless management..
They don't deserve single star also but to submit the post it's mandatory to give 1 star..

itemReviewed.name: St Mathews Academy And Junior College - Salunkhe Vihar Society,Mohammed Wadi

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My daughter is studied from class 1 and now almost three years completed and she is now Class 3. This year I got my son admission in Nursery. I am writing the review here so that  it might help someone to understand better of this school.

Pros :-
-Teachers are well trained and supportive. If you give daily min 1 hour to your child , you do not need outside tuition classes for your child.
- They have school app name "SMA - School book" where teacher, admin, finance all communicate with you and vice versa for homework, activity, fees etc. This is one stop for all.
- They have dedicated school bus and driver will share the location everyday in WhatsApp for To and Fro. You can track the bus location.
- They give attention to all students whether talented or not.
- The best thing is they educate also manners to students which we don't see in other schools. like - help others, take care of students who is in lower class etc.
- Fees is normal as per market standard. This school is not like to loot parents in the name of exhibition etc etc.
- this school is in ICSE board, thus  they take care of English, Computer as well with other subjects.

I do not see any cons for this school, however have some recommendation.

- If PTM conduct in respective classes rather than in Hall (assembly Area), it will be great with no disturbance.

itemReviewed.name: St Mathews Academy And Junior College - Salunkhe Vihar Society,Mohammed Wadi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Arrogant Principal and has no ethics. Her talks and behavior is exact Opposite to the looks. The meeting is conducted on skype, no proper communication and So called founder principal is scolding and screaming at teachers. Pathetic experience. Good that I haven't enrolled my kid to this school. I'll tell parents better look for more options than this kinda school. Yes and one more thing while we were interacting the so called founder was passing bad and dirty comments about the other school's  girl students. I was so embarrassed with those comments coming from an academician. Worst experience ever.
